title: Redstone Optimized
description: An Modpack that includes some auxiliary modules and allows you to play Minecraft smoothly. 一個整合包，包含一些輔助模組，同時又能流暢遊玩Minecraft。
body:
# Redstone Optimized 紅石優化整合包 This integration package contains some auxiliary mod, such as: JEI, Litematica, Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, VoxelMap and other auxiliary mod, which also includes some shaders and performance optimization modules, which can smoothly Play Minecraft.
在這個整合包當中包含了一些輔助模組，如：JEI, 原理圖(Litematica), Tweakeroo, MiniHUD , 小地圖等等輔助模組，其中也包含了 一些光影包及效能優化模組，能夠順順遊玩Minecraft。
If you just want to play Minecraft smoothly and don't need some auxiliary mods, you can consider using Easy Optimized to play.
如果你只是想要能流暢遊玩Minecraft，不需要一些輔助模組，可以考慮使用簡易優化整合包來遊玩。
The functions of some mods will be regarded as cheating on some servers, and you must be responsible for using them.
部分模組的功能在一些伺服器上，會被視為作弊行為，使用須自行負責。

## External Sources 外部來源 The following mods are used in this modpack, but they are not provided on the Modrinth platform, and do not need to be downloaded separately. 以下模組為本整合包有使用到，但Modrinth平台上沒有提供，並不需要而外下載。 This list is applicable to the latest version of the book. 此列表是適用於最新版本的整合包 [Litematica Printer by sakura-ryoko](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/litematica-printer/releases) [Syncmatica by sakura-ryoko](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/syncmatica/releases) [QuickShulker by Haocen2004](https://github.com/Haocen2004/quickshulker/releases) [Eye Care 護眼大補丸 by hsds](https://youtu.be/zXTOMgUSnJc)
